compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The registry identifies P1, P2, P3, and P4. Visual evidence confirms only two visible containers: one yellow pot (P1) and one black pot (P3/P4). P2 is absent or entirely subsumed. P3/P4 contains a single, struggling sprout.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot, contains white rabbit anchor)

plant_audit.P1: Soil surface appears dark and undisturbed. No visible foliage.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a single, thin, green sprout. The white rabbit anchor is present. The sprout shows minimal vertical growth over the 5-day period.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, appears moist/damp across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely perlite or mineral substrate) present in the black pot.

temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: No change. The sprout remains in a static, low-vigor state.

visual_health_inference.P1: Dormant or failed. No vegetative output.
visual_health_inference.P3: Stagnant. The sprout is alive but shows no signs of active development or leaf expansion.
visual_health_inference.overall_biome: Low-energy state; potential light deficiency or substrate issues.

anomalies: Total absence of P2 and P4 specimens.
Extreme lack of growth in P3 over the 5-day observation window.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of arrested development. The yellow pot (P1) remains empty of visible plant life. The black pot (P3) contains a single, solitary sprout that has failed to progress in size or complexity over the last five days. The environment appears stable but unproductive, suggesting the specimens are either in a state of severe stress or the initial planting has failed to establish.
